---
name: 'production template '
about: to use for a production run for a specific type
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''
type: Task

---

preparation
- [ ] prepare size patterns
- [ ] weigh an prepare yarn for 10 items
- [ ] prepare punch cards for silver reed if the case
- [ ] prepare boxes + tissue paper for 10 items
- [ ] prepare labels  with hanging yarn and passports for 10 items

production
- [ ] production panels front/back on waste yarn including linking together
- [ ] production sleeves 
- [ ] sewing ends
- [ ] linking
- [ ] cutting yarn ends

finishing / packing
- [ ] washing / drying
- [ ] ironing / steaming
- [ ] putting in boxes
- [ ] inserting in [stock list](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1brZ0Db65Y-aHFGSaVo6yraNM2z41lPtoBl4-MgjRhTQ?usp=drive_fs), receives name and QR
- [ ] filling passport
- [ ] apply stickers on passport and box
- [ ] close box
- [ ] put in shelve
